data.short_description: Couch Potato, a restaurant specializing in baked potatoes, walking tacos, hot dogs, and spudwiches, has opened at 1 Eden Avenue in Southington in a historic 1941 building previously home to Southington News and Dominic's Men's Shop. The eatery previously operated in Waterbury and Wallingford. Hours are Monday–Saturday 10:30 AM–9:00 PM, closed Sunday.

data.store_name: Lu-Mac's Package Store / Jimmies Ice Cream Shoppe
data.short_description: Lu-Mac's Package Store and Jimmies Ice Cream Shoppe are relocating to a new farmhouse/country barn-style building adjacent to their current location at 356 Route 2 in Preston. The new building will feature a full-sized NASCAR race car suspended from the ceiling. Construction is actively underway as of April 2026.

data.location: 122 Prospect Hill Road, Sophia's Plaza, East Windsor, CT
data.short_description: Molly's Sweet Spot, a bakery owned by local resident Molly Francia, is opening in June 2026 at Sophia's Plaza in East Windsor. The shop will offer custom cakes, cupcakes, gourmet cookies, cakesicles, brownies, dirty sodas, and more with both walk-in and custom order options.

data.location: 501 Evergreen Way, The Shops at Evergreen Walk, South Windsor, CT
data.short_description: CollectUConn featuring The Gampel Collection is opening at The Shops at Evergreen Walk in South Windsor, adjacent to Disibio Shoes and across from Old Navy. The store will sell game-used lockers, limited-edition seats, championship banner tote bags, and commemorative pieces from Gampel Pavilion's renovation. A portion of proceeds benefits UConn Athletics; online shopping is also available at collectuconn.com.

data.location: 1447 Whalley Avenue, Whalley Commons, New Haven, CT
data.short_description: 7 Brew Coffee is opening its New Haven location on April 13, 2026 at Whalley Commons on Whalley Avenue. Pre-opening events include a charity weekend (April 3–5), a friends and family free drink weekend (April 10–12), and community free drink hours during opening week. The drive-through chain serves flavored coffees, energy drinks, and smoothies.

Sprouts Farmers Market is planning a 26,000+ square foot store at 1052 Boston Post Road in Milford on the site of the former Hooters restaurant and an adjacent Genesis dealership property. This would be the first CT Sprouts location, with another planned for Westport. The project is currently in the site plan phase with no opening date announced.

Ross Dress for Less is eyeing a ~30,000 square foot former Big Lots space at 1150 Union Street in West Springfield, MA, with a tentative opening in Fall 2026. The opening is contingent on lease finalization and construction permits. Ross has also signed a lease for a Chicopee location as part of its broader East Coast expansion.
